parsed.generic_mechanism: Persuasion accumulates when each conclusion follows a concrete causal explanation; reversing that dependency chain makes claims feel unearned and forces readers to reconstruct the intervention.

paraphrased_evidence.A: The chapters connect compulsive repetition to self-created discomfort, then explain how processing, conditioning, and restrictive methods preserve the apparent reward, progressively reframing abstention as restored choice.
paraphrased_evidence.B: Summaries, promises, and conclusions repeatedly precede the experiences and causal explanations meant to support them; reverse sequencing breaks local reasoning and prevents the chapters from building cumulative conviction.

paraphrased_evidence.ours: Summaries, promises, and conclusions repeatedly precede the experiences and causal explanations meant to support them; reverse sequencing breaks local reasoning and prevents the chapters from building cumulative conviction.
paraphrased_evidence.ref: The chapters connect compulsive repetition to self-created discomfort, then explain how processing, conditioning, and restrictive methods preserve the apparent reward, progressively reframing abstention as restored choice.
